Details: Application of Chlorine, in the form of Chlorine or Sodium Hypochlorite,  was effective in oxidation of diazinon under the evaluated conditions. One study showed that 0.3 mg/l of diazinon in natural waters can be oxidized completely in 10 minutes by a 2.5 mg/l of chlorine dose. The same study also showed that with this chlorine dose, the formation of TTHMs was below the EU standard (0.1 mg/l) for drinking water [761].
